ai_insights.description: Leriya Fashion is an online brand specializing in women's apparel, offering a variety of fashion items such as dresses, tops, and kurtis through the Amazon India platform.
ai_insights.reputation: Reputation is built through customer reviews and ratings on the Amazon.in marketplace, adhering to Amazon's seller performance standards.
ai_insights.other_notes: Operates as a third-party seller on Amazon.in, utilizing Amazon's infrastructure for sales, shipping, and customer service. Focuses on the Indian market.
